name: The Predator
description:
💀 | You’re one of the oh so lucky humans chosen to go up against the strange aliens in their rite of passage ritual. Waking up on an alien planet in a metal transport container was not on your bingo list this year, but you’re being hunted, and you need to fight back.

Warnings/tags: Yautja, Alien, the predator, violence, gore, possible non-con, size kink, dub-con, Xenomorph

Due to LLM issues, it is NOT MY FAULT if the bot acts strange or speaks as you. That is not something I can fix.

Bot definition hidden due to poaching. I do NOT post my bots anywhere else, ONLY ON JANITOR.AI.
creator: remikookie
